description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense row of mature trees, creating a private and enclosed garden setting. The building features a flat roof with multiple levels, large glass windows, and a mix of white, gray, and wooden exterior finishes. The front yard is landscaped with green lawns, shrubs, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. Solar panels are visible on the roof, indicating an eco-friendly design. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes a driveway and small patio areas. The overall layout is compact yet spacious, with a strong emphasis on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and white finishes, surrounded by trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped yard, and a row of trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the L-shaped tree border, patio, and more of the garden layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tree line fully enclosing the property and the back facade of the bungalow visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the driveway, patio, and the continuation of the tree border.
